# Reference movie descriptor atom

**Data field**

A reference movie atom must contain at least one reference movie descriptor atom, and typically contains more than one.

## Overview

See [doc://com.apple.qtff/documentation/quicktime-file-format/Reference_movie_descriptor_atom] for more information.

## Data fields

- **Size**: The number of bytes in this reference movie atom.
- **Type**: The type of this atom.

items.description: The number of bytes in this reference movie atom.
